rule1.title: Question Format
points: Each myth is True or False

rule2.title: Time Limit
points: Timer starts automatically for each question

rule3.title: Scoring Rule
points: You must answer at least 4 out of 5 correctly to pass

results.title: Challenge Complete
results.outstanding: Outstanding! You have a complete understanding of AI concepts and myths.
results.great_job: Great job! You have a solid understanding of AI concepts.
results.reinforcement: You're on the right track, but some AI concepts need reinforcement.
